key_concepts: Some linear models expect data to follow a normal (Gaussian) distribution natively.
Power transforms (like Log, Box-Cox, or Yeo-Johnson) mathematically shrink the long tail of a skewed distribution, making it look more like a bell curve.

Quantile transforms forcefully map any distribution to a uniform or normal shape by manipulating the absolute ranks of the data points, which completely distorts original distances but stabilizes extreme outliers.

definitions.definition: Transformasi matematis (seperti logaritma) untuk menstabilkan varians dan mendekatkan distribusi ke bentuk normal.
Metode pemetaan pemusatan observasi berbasis distribusi peringkat kumulatif probabilitas dari datanya.

examples: Applying a log transform to heavily skewed price data to stabilize the variance.
exclusions: Avoid the dense mathematical formula of Box-Cox/Yeo-Johnson.
